name: refactor-verify
description: Verify refactoring equivalence by auto-generating test cases, fuzzing with Hypothesis, and comparing outputs between old and new code.
intent_triggers: 幫我驗證重構後的程式碼是否等價
這段重構有沒有改壞東西
對這兩個版本的函式做模糊測試
幫我生成行為快照並驗證
比較舊版和新版的輸出是否一致
verify my refactoring didn't break anything
compare two functions for behavioral equivalence
run fuzz tests on refactored code
幫我檢查這個重構在邊界值上表現是否相同

command.description: Subcommand: compare, fuzz, test, snapshot, verify, report

old_file.description: Path to the original code file

new_file.description: Path to the refactored code file

test_file.description: Existing test file path to run

functions.description: Functions to snapshot: 'all' or comma-separated names

snapshot.description: Snapshot file path for verify command

examples.intent: 比較兩個版本的函式是否等價
Fuzz test refactored code with 1000 rounds

error_codes.1: Function not found in source file
